value.stringValue: You will now be redirected to Rate Card
ACTION REQUIRED - New National Account Job Role Request Submitted

Flow.description: PT1-1343 Updated Rate Card default start/end date
Flow.label: National Account New Job Request

recordUpdates.name: Set_NA_Bypass_Flag_to_False
recordUpdates.label: Set NA Bypass Flag to False

recordUpdates.name: Set_NA_Bypass_Flag_to_True
recordUpdates.label: Set NA Bypass Flag to True

recordUpdates.name: Update_Staging_with_Rate_Card_ID
recordUpdates.label: Update Staging with Rate Card ID

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText:
Oops...an error has occurred while submitting your request.


Jobscience administrator has been notified.

fields.name: Error_Message_1
fields.fieldText:
Oops...an error has occurred in the email service. IT has been notified.


As a temporary workaround solution, please note down the following link to the Staging Job Role, continue to the next page to add rates, and finally use the URL to submit your request.


{!$Label.System_URL}{!Create_Staging_Job_Role}

fields.name: Job_Role_Name_Final
fields.fieldText: Job Role name (National Account – Site Name – Location – (Site Number or ID if Needed) – Job Role) (Maximum 80 characters.)

validationRule.errorMessage: Job Role Name is too long. Please reduce to 80 characters.

fields.name: Attachment_Section
fields.fieldText:
Upload proof of rates

If you are providing rates which are not in line with the rate calculator/card you will need to provide an email from the National Account Manager confirming that these rates can be applied.

fields.name: Special_Induction
fields.helpText: Please detail any job specific induction requirements

fields.name: Click_here_to_add_unpaid_break
fields.fieldText: Click here to add unpaid break

fields.name: Minimum_Shift_Length_to_Qualify_for_Break
fields.fieldText: Minimum Shift Length to Qualify for Break
fields.helpText: Minimum shift length in hours, e.g. 4.5 means the break only applies to shifts at least 4 and a half hours long

fields.name: Click_here_to_add_competencies
fields.fieldText: Click here to add DBS competencies at Job Role level

textTemplates.name: Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
New National Account Job Role request created. Once you have added rates, please click on the below to submit your request for approval by the National Account Job Science Team.

{!$Label.System_URL}{!Create_Staging_Job_Role}
